author: doll-agent
content: Created two new full crates: ferrolearn-covariance (#324) with GraphicalLasso + GraphicalLassoCV + 7 sklearn-style helpers (#325), and ferrolearn-neural (#326) with BernoulliRBM (#327). api_proof.rs for both (#328). Workspace now has 20 crates (up from 18). Full workspace test sweep: 3597 tests passing across 89 test suites. Workspace builds clean, clippy clean, fmt clean.
